title: Squiz Document
description: The JSON contract between the agent and the renderer. The agent writes one of these to a file, then runs `squiz <file>`.

theme.description: Theme name. One of: paper, phosphor, amber, beige, rose, ocean, forest, slate. Empty/omitted lets the renderer's per-repo auto-rotation pick one.

scanlines.description: CRT scanline overlay across the whole page.

cursor.description: Blinking terminal cursor in the topbar. Defaults to true when omitted; set false to suppress.

spec.description: The narrative spec rendered above the squizzes.

squizzes.description: The list of decisions presented to the user.

spec.description: Spec narrative shown at the top of the page.

path.description: Path string shown in the topbar (e.g. a source file path).

lede.description: One-line summary shown under the title.

paragraph.description: A single paragraph of spec text. May contain {{squizId}} markers that render as in-page anchor chips.

squiz.description: One decision presented to the user as a chooser with options.

id.description: Stable slug identifying this squiz. Used as an anchor target and as the export key.

title.description: Card heading — the question being asked.

quote.description: Optional pull-quote from the spec, shown beside the title.

options.description: The branches the user picks between.

option.description: One branch of a squiz. The user picks exactly one per squiz.

id.description: Stable slug, comes back in feedback as `chose`.

label.description: e.g. "Option A" — auto-derived from index if empty.

name.description: Short display name shown in the card title.

art.description: Unified visual-preview field. Five forms supported: raw SVG markup ("<svg viewBox='...'>...</svg>"), named library ("wf:calendar-grid"), DSL primitive ("grid:7x7@0.55", "spark:[3,5,4,7]", etc.), explicit hide ("none" — no art slot at all), or omitted/empty (auto per-letter abstract pattern).

oneOf.description: Explicit hide — no art slot at all.
Named architecture diagram from the library.
DSL primitive (grid, spark, bars, swatches, pills, sample, circle-pack).

art_svg.description: Legacy field — treated as raw SVG only. Use `art` for new code.

recommendation.description: When non-empty, marks this option as the author's recommended choice and carries the explanation of *why*. The renderer shows a "★ RECOMMENDED" chip + the explanation as a small editorial callout under the option's desc. Empty → option is one among equals. At most one option per squiz should carry a recommendation; multiple renders all of them but is almost always an authoring mistake.
